content.cn_text: 你将听到新西兰广播中的一段讲话，内容是关于一场为慈善筹款而举办的艺术品义卖。
content.en_text: You will hear a talk on New Zealand radio about an art sale which is being held to raise

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第10页的第11至13题。
content.en_text: money for charity. First you have some time to look at questions 11 to 13 on page 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至13题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 13.

content.cn_text: Diane：基督城最受期待的艺术活动之一，是今年由 Neil Curtis 组织的慈善艺术品义卖。
content.en_text: Diane: One of the most anticipated art events in Christchurch is the charity art sale organised

content.cn_text: Neil，请给我们介绍一下吧。
content.en_text: this year by Neil Curtis. Neil, tell us all about it.

content.cn_text: Neil：好的 Diane，这看起来将会是迄今为止规模最大的艺术品义卖，而最棒的是，
content.en_text: Neil: Well Diane, this looks like being the biggest art sale yet and the best thing about it is

content.cn_text: 筹集到的钱将全部用于慈善。所以你们可能首先想知道的是
content.en_text: that the money raised will all go to charity. So what you probably want to know first is

content.cn_text: 地点在哪里。这些画作本周都会展出，大部分在购物中心里的 Star Gallery，
content.en_text: where it is. Well the pictures will be on view all this week, most of them at the Star Gallery

content.cn_text: 但今年我们的画作太多了，所以还会在隔壁的
content.en_text: in the shopping mall. But we have so many pictures this year that we're also showing some in the

content.cn_text: 咖啡馆展出一部分。所以你们可以在每天9点到5点之间进去看看。如果你感兴趣的
content.en_text: cafe next door. So do drop in and see them any day between 9 and 5. Now if you're interested

content.cn_text: 不只是观看，而是购买，我们希望很多人都会这样，那么真正的义卖会在
content.en_text: in buying rather than just looking and we hope a lot of you will be, the actual sale will take

content.cn_text: 周四晚上举行，义卖从7:30开始。义卖前会提供茶点，
content.en_text: place on Thursday evening with sales starting at 7.30. Refreshments will be available before

content.cn_text: 从6:30开始。我们有大约50件本地艺术家的作品，展示了非常广泛的
content.en_text: the sale starting at 6.30. We've got about 50 works by local artists showing a huge range of

content.cn_text: 风格和媒介，稍后我会介绍其中一些。你们可能也
content.en_text: styles and media and in a minute I'll tell you about some of them. You're probably also

content.cn_text: 想知道钱交出去之后会用到哪里。所有收益
content.en_text: interested in what's going to happen to your money once you've handed it over. Well all proceeds

content.cn_text: 都会用于帮助新西兰本地以及其他国家的残障儿童。
content.en_text: will go to support children who are disabled both here in New Zealand and also in other countries.

content.cn_text: 所以你可以找到一幅原创画作，支持本地人才，同时帮助这些孩子。
content.en_text: So you can find an original painting, support local talent and help these children all at the same time.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第11页的第14至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk you have some time to look at questions 14 to 20 on page 11.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第14至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 14 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在我来介绍几位慷慨同意捐出自己画作的艺术家，
content.en_text: Now let me tell you a bit about some of the artists who have kindly agreed to donate their

content.cn_text: 这些画作会用于慈善艺术品义卖。其中一位是 Don Studley，他对这次义卖特别关注，
content.en_text: pictures to the charity art sale. One of them is Don Studley who has a special interest in the

content.cn_text: 因为他5岁的女儿出生时有严重的背部问题。在今年早些时候接受
content.en_text: art sale because his five-year-old daughter was born with a serious back problem. After an

content.cn_text: 手术后，她现在恢复得很好，但 Don 说他想提供一些东西来帮助
content.en_text: operation earlier this year she's now doing fine but Don says he wants to offer something to help

content.cn_text: 其他不那么幸运的孩子。Don 完全是自学成才的，他说自己热爱绘画。
content.en_text: other less fortunate children. Don has totally self-taught and says he's passionate about painting.

content.cn_text: 他的画描绘了一些生活在自然栖息地中的新西兰鸟类。
content.en_text: His paintings depict some of our New Zealand birds in their natural habitats.

content.cn_text: 一位相对较新来到新西兰的人是 James Chang，他九年前从台湾来到这里，
content.en_text: One relative newcomer to New Zealand is James Chang who came here from Taiwan nine years ago

content.cn_text: 当时56岁。Chang 先生在搬到基督城生活之前，曾在台湾举办过13场展览，
content.en_text: at the age of 56. Mr Chang had 13 exhibitions in Taiwan before he came to live here in Christchurch

content.cn_text: 所以他是一位成熟的艺术家，艺术是他一生的热情所在。他的画
content.en_text: so he's a well-established artist and art has been a lifelong passion for him. His paintings are

content.cn_text: 绝对值得一看。如果你喜欢色彩强烈的抽象画，你一定会喜欢它们。
content.en_text: certainly worth looking at. If you like abstract pictures with strong color schemes you'll love them.

content.cn_text: Natalie Stevens 出生在新西兰，但曾在中国、澳大利亚和西班牙展出作品。
content.en_text: Natalie Stevens was born in New Zealand but has exhibited in China, Australia and Spain.

content.cn_text: 除了是一名艺术家，她还是一名网站设计师。她认为艺术应该是普遍的，
content.en_text: As well as being an artist she's a website designer. She believes art should be universal

content.cn_text: 她的画使用柔和色彩，并混合多种媒介。她的大多数作品是肖像画，所以留意一下，
content.en_text: and her paintings use soft colors in a mixture of media. Most of her pictures are portraits so watch

content.cn_text: 其中一些人甚至可能是你的朋友。然后我们还有来自韩国的 Christine Shin。
content.en_text: some of them may even be friends of yours. And then we have Christine Shin from Korea.

content.cn_text: Christine 是两年前来到新西兰时才开始学英语的，
content.en_text: Christine only started to learn English two years ago when she arrived in New Zealand

content.cn_text: 但她已经从事专业绘画超过10年，而且她确实知道如何通过艺术这种通用语言
content.en_text: but she's been painting professionally for over 10 years and she sure knows how to communicate

content.cn_text: 传达强烈的信息。她通常以照片为基础进行创作，
content.en_text: strong messages through the universal language of art. She usually works from photographs and

content.cn_text: 并绘制精致的水彩画，将传统亚洲影响与新西兰风景结合起来，
content.en_text: paints delicate watercolours which combine traditional Asian influences with New Zealand landscapes

content.cn_text: 呈现出我们本地风景的独特视角。好了，我现在能介绍的就这么多，
content.en_text: giving a very special view of our local scenery. Well that's all I have time to tell you now

content.cn_text: 但除了这四位之外，还有许多其他艺术家的作品也会出售，所以请一定
content.en_text: but as well as these four there are many other artists whose work will be on sale so do come along

content.cn_text: 周四来参加。我们接受支票、信用卡或现金。记住，即使你不买画，
content.en_text: on Thursday. We accept checks, credit cards or cash and remember even if you don't buy a picture

content.cn_text: 你也随时可以捐款。第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: you can always make a donation. That is the end of part two.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc:
Complete the summary below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 11–13.

items.title: The paintings will be displayed in the Star Gallery and in a nearby 11. ______.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问画作会在 Star Gallery 和附近哪里展出，原文说 in the cafe next door，因此答案是 cafe。

items.title: The sale of pictures will begin at 12. ______ p.m. on Thursday, and there will be refreshments beforehand.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问周四义卖几点开始，原文说 sales starting at 7.30，因此答案是 7.30 / 7:30。

items.title: The money raised will all be used to help the 13. ______ children in New Zealand and other countries.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问筹集的钱会帮助新西兰和其他国家的什么儿童，原文说 children who are disabled，因此答案是 disabled。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the summary below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Charity Art Sale
• The paintings will be displayed in the Star Gallery and in a nearby $11$.
• The sale of pictures will begin at $12$ p.m. on Thursday, and there will be refreshments beforehand.
• The money raised will all be used to help the $13$ children in New Zealand and other countries.

groups.desc:
Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 14-20.

items.title: pictures of the 14. ______ of New Zealand
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问 Don Studley 的画是 New Zealand 的什么，原文说 New Zealand birds，因此答案是 birds。

items.title: had a number of 15. ______ there
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 James Chang 在台湾有多次什么，原文说 had 13 exhibitions in Taiwan，因此答案是 exhibitions / art exhibitions。

items.title: 16. ______ paintings
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 James Chang 的画是什么类型，原文说 abstract pictures with strong color schemes，因此答案是 abstract。

items.title: is an artist and a website 17. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Natalie Stevens 既是艺术家，也是 website 什么，原文说 website designer，因此答案是 designer。

items.title: mainly does 18. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Natalie Stevens 主要画什么，原文说 most of her pictures are portraits，因此答案是 portraits。

items.title: lived in New Zealand for 19. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 Christine Shin 在新西兰住了多久，原文说 arrived in New Zealand two years ago，因此答案是 two years / 2 years。

items.title: paintings are based on 20. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 Christine Shin 的画基于什么，原文说 works from photographs，因此答案是 photographs。

Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

content:
• daughter is recovering from a problem with her back
• self-taught artist
• pictures of the $14$ of New Zealand

• originally from Taiwan
• had a number of $15$ there

• has shown pictures in many countries
• is an artist and a website $17$

• soft colors, various media
• mainly does $18$

• lived in New Zealand for $19$
• Korean

• paintings are based on $20$
